${ModID}:MagicBoot.NAME: Magic Boot
${ModID}:MagicBoot.FLAVOR: When wound up, the boot breaks all known laws of conservation of matter.
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever you would deal #b6 or less unblocked attack damage, increase it to #b7.

${ModID}:IoMoth.NAME: Runic Moth
${ModID}:IoMoth.FLAVOR: An ancient charm depicting a Lepidoptera.
DESCRIPTIONS: At the start of your turn, until you lose HP, draw 1 additional card.
